component.name: Mousehop
component.summary: Share one mouse, keyboard, and clipboard across machines

description.p: Mousehop is an open-source software KVM. Glide a single mouse, keyboard, and clipboard across Linux, macOS, and Windows machines over the local network — no KVM hardware, no cloud service.
Mousehop is a fork of lan-mouse by Florian Eschberger, used under the GPL-3.0 license, with a native menu-bar app, a system tray, per-peer tuning, sturdier discovery, and a refreshed UI.
